_comment: Provider/cascade config. Edited by humans and by the model-watch bot PRs. structured: json_schema = strict structured outputs; json_object = schema embedded in prompt. Model IDs verified July 2026: openrouter cohere/north-mini-code:free and poolside/laguna-m.1:free confirmed live in catalog (qwen/qwen3-coder:free was removed and replaced); gemini-2.0-flash is the current valid Flash model on Google's OpenAI-compatible endpoint (no google/ prefix, gemini-3.5-flash does not exist); groq llama-3.3-70b-versatile is the current Groq free-tier Llama 70B model. deepseek-v4-flash confirmed current on DeepSeek's own OpenAI-compatible API (api-docs.deepseek.com) — deepseek-chat/deepseek-reasoner deprecate 2026-07-24.
